caption: A man with a shaved head, a dark beard, and tattoos on his right arm is positioned in front of a microphone in a room with sound-absorbing foam walls. He wears a white t-shirt and black over-ear headphones. A professional microphone, labeled "Audio-Technica AT2020", is mounted on a boom arm in front of him. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks and gestures with his right hand, which appears as a motion blur. In the first frame, his hand is positioned near his face; in the second, it moves further outward and upward. By the third frame, his arm is raised higher, and in the final frame, his hand remains aloft as he continues to speak. The setting remains constant, focusing on the man from the chest up as he interacts with the recording equipment.
